name: Willie Colón
abstract: William Anthony Colón Román (April 28, 1950 – February 21, 2026) was an American salsa musician and social activist. He began his career as a trombonist but also sang, wrote, produced and acted.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Schlitz Salute to Latin Roots
Newport Jazz Festival: Schlitz Salute to Latin Roots

about_quotes.speaker: Luis Conte
about_quotes.evidence: I found out about Fania – he had a cassette and he was Willie Colon... I says, 'Well this is Willie Colon.' ... I bought a Willie Colon record
about_quotes.doc_title: Luis Conte interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, November 24, 2025

about_quotes.speaker: Vince Lateano
about_quotes.evidence: It’s either Poncho or a local conga player named Willie, a conga drummer named Willie Colon... I think it’s Willie Colon.
about_quotes.doc_title: Vince Lateano interviewed by Monk Rowe, San Francisco, California, August 8, 2002

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Malone
about_quotes.evidence: I played on all the salsa recordings in New York too. Fania Records, 1974, ’75, ’76. Willie Colon...
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Malone interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 3, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Frank "Machito" Grillo
about_quotes.evidence: you imagine if we would have the publicity of Willie Colon and Eddie Palmieri
